mapper.select: /* FAQ 카테고리 목록 조회 */ select faq_cate_idx, faq_cate_name from tb_faq_category order by faq_cate_idx
mapper.update: /* FAQ 카테고리 수정 */ update tb_faq_category set faq_cate_name = #{faqCateName}, mod_uid = #{modUid }, mod_date = now() where faq_cate_idx = #{faqCateIdx}

/* FAQ 수정 */ update tb_faq set faq_cate_idx = #{faqCateIdx}, question = #{question}, answer = replace(#{answer}, '\\n', '
'), mod_uid = #{modUid }, mod_date = now() where faq_idx = #{faqIdx}
mapper.select: /* 자료실 카테고리 목록 조회 */ select rfnc_cate_idx, rfnc_cate_name from tb_reference_category order by rfnc_cate_idx
mapper.insert: insert into tb_reference ( rfnc_cate_idx, title, contents, attach_idx, reg_uid, reg_date ) values ( #{referCateIdx}, #{referTitle}, #{referContents}, #{attachIdx}, #{regUid}, now() )

insert into tb_attach_file ( attach_idx, attach_idx_no, file_path, file_origin_name, file_save_name, file_size, reg_uid, reg_date ) values ( #{attachIdx}, #{attachIdxNo}, #{file_path}, #{file_origin_name}, #{file_save_name}, #{fileSize}, #{regUid}, now() )
/* 자료실 카테고리 등록 */ insert into tb_reference_category ( rfnc_cate_name, /* 카테고리명 */ reg_uid, /* 등록자ID */ reg_date /* 등록일시 */ ) values ( #{referCateName }, #{regUid }, now() )
mapper.update: /* 자료실 카테고리 수정 */ update tb_reference_category set rfnc_cate_name = #{referCateName}, mod_uid = #{modUid }, mod_date = now() where rfnc_cate_idx = #{referCateIdx}
mapper.select:
/* 자료 한건 조회 */ select rfnc_idx, rfnc_cate_idx, title, replace(contents, '
', '\\n') contents, attach_idx from tb_reference where rfnc_idx = #{referIdx}
mapper.update:
/* FAQ 수정 */ update tb_reference set rfnc_cate_idx = #{referCateIdx}, title = #{referTitle}, contents = replace(#{referContents}, '\\n', '
'), mod_uid = #{modUid }, mod_date = now() where rfnc_idx = #{referIdx}
